baseline.reason: Correctly identifies CWE-401 memory leak in glutAddMenuEntry. Accurately traces source (calloc at line 273) through error path (fgState.ActiveMenus check) to sink (exit(1) in fgError). No unsupported speculation. Minor omission: doesn't mention the freeglut_return_if_fail early-return leak at line 275, which is also fixed by moving allocation after both guards.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the same CWE-401 vulnerability and trigger path as the baseline. Accurately traces allocation, condition check, fgError call, and exit(1) termination. Slightly more verbose but factually precise. Same minor omission regarding the freeglut_return_if_fail early-return path at line 275.
